title: FSMM Spigot Bridge
description: Makes FSMM Accounts work on Spigot/Bukkit based Modded Servers with Vault API
body:
This plugin makes [FSMM](https://modrinth.com/mod/fsmm) Accounts accesible to the [Vault](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/vault.34315/) API.

This is intended for Servers that can run MODS and PLUGINS.    
FSMM is a mod that allows you to define vanilla and modded items as withdrawable and depositable into the FSMM Account & Banking System.
